title: Don't Starve: Moss Edition
description: If it can eat, maybe so tasty!
body:
Add some food to prevent player from starving!

Unlike other mods, food acquisition in Don't Starve: Moss Edition is more convenient!

Items:
- **Fruit Knife**: *Generally speaking*, it is used as a tool, but **it can also serve as an Iron Sword!**
- **Cactus Meet**: Using cactus to craft, it hurts a bit when eating.
- **Stripped Cactus**: Right-click a few times empty-handed on the cactus (if you are not afraid of dead) or use an axe stripped the cactus.
- **Stripped Cactus Meet**: like *Cactus Meet*, but it is safe!
- **Plants Food**: It can also be considered a vegetable... *right?*
- **Undead Food**: Cooking those rubbish, let we try to eat!
- **Some Drink**: Delicious to drink!
- **Misc**: Have more!

Don't Starve: Moss Edition are **unofficial remake** of Don't Starve.

*Attention: This mod has no relations with the computer game "Don't Starve".*

* 2rd: [dontstarve (on CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dontstarve)
* Reborn: [Don't Starve:Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/dontstarvereborn)
* 3rd: [DontStarve3](https://modrinth.com/mod/dt3) --- [(on CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dt3)
* 4th: [Never Famine](https://modrinth.com/mod/dontstarve4) --- [(on CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dontstarve4)

This mod on [CurseForge's page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dontstarve-moss-edition) / [MC百科's page](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/22123.html).
